projects.name: Machine Translation Using LSTM with Attention
projects.description: Collected and preprocessed over 250,000 English–Vietnamese sentence pairs. Implemented a sequence-to-sequence model with LSTM encoder–decoder and Bahdanau attention mechanism. Experimented with baseline LSTM for comparison. Managed dataset training and evaluation pipelines on HuggingFace Datasets. Applied BLEU score evaluation and monitored validation loss to optimize hyperparameters.

projects.name: Medical Bot with Transformer and GPT
tech_used: PyTorch (Transformer, GPT, RL with PPO & DPO)
projects.description: Built deep learning models from scratch using Transformer and GPT architectures with PyTorch, trained on Vietnamese medical datasets. Applied Byte Pair Encoding for efficient dataset preprocessing. Integrated Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches (PPO, DPO) to fine-tune language models. Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on UCI Heart Disease dataset. Trained and evaluated multiple machine learning models in TensorFlow, optimizing hyperparameters. Designed training pipelines, implemented data cleaning, and maintained datasets on Google Drive.

projects.name: NLP Fake News Classification
tech_used: Scikit-learn (Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree)
projects.description: Constructed a custom dataset for text classification, partially synthesized data using Large Language Models (LLMs). Implemented traditional text representation (Bag of Words) with Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, and Decision Tree. Applied deep learning with Doc2Vec for document embeddings, experimenting with and without pre-trained models. Compared approaches based on text representation, dataset quality, and learning methods. Derived insights on effective strategies for text classification.

projects.name: Face Recognition System Using OpenCV and Deep Learning
projects.description: Explored Computer Vision fundamentals and OpenCV applications. Built a face recognition pipeline including dataset construction, face encoding, and recognition on static images and live video streams. Implemented core modules: build_dataset, encode_face, recognize_faces_image, recognize_faces_video. Applied Deep Learning face embedding techniques. Conducted experiments with multiple test images and live webcam streams to evaluate system performance.
